starter_village.name: Harmonia Village
starter_village.description: A peaceful starting village where adventurers begin their journey

cave_dungeon.name: Whispering Cave
cave_dungeon.description: A dark cave filled with slimes and bats. Strange whispers echo through the tunnels.

forest_dungeon.name: Corrupted Forest
forest_dungeon.description: A once-beautiful forest twisted by meta-corruption. Reality bends here.

capital_city.name: Scriptura
capital_city.description: The capital city. Home to the Scriptweaver's Guild.

suburban_overworld.name: Suburbia
suburban_overworld.description: A cheerful 90s suburban town. Something feels... off.

steampunk_overworld.name: Cogsworth Junction
steampunk_overworld.description: A Victorian-era clockwork city at the boundary between medieval and suburban. Brass pipes hiss, gas lamps flicker, and mechanical sentinels patrol the cobblestone streets.

industrial_overworld.name: The Efficiency District
industrial_overworld.description: A factory complex where everything has been optimized for production. Workers are numbered, breaks are scheduled, and individuality is inefficient.

futuristic_overworld.name: The Network
futuristic_overworld.description: A digital cityscape optimized for computation. Buildings are server farms. Streets are data highways. People are I/O terminals.

abstract_overworld.name: The Remainder
abstract_overworld.description: Everything unnecessary has been removed. Color, detail, names — all optimized away. What remains is pure geometry, pure function, pure... nothing.

maple_heights_village.name: Maple Heights
maple_heights_village.description: A quiet suburban neighborhood. Picket fences, mowed lawns, and an unsettling sense that everything is a little too perfect.

brasston_village.name: Brasston
brasston_village.description: A clockwork market town where brass is currency and every citizen runs on schedule.

rivet_row_village.name: Rivet Row
rivet_row_village.description: A workers' settlement on the factory outskirts. The company provides everything. The company owns everything.

node_prime_village.name: Node Prime
node_prime_village.description: A digital rest stop in the network. Data flows like water and programs walk like people.

vertex_village.name: The Vertex
vertex_village.description: A point of convergence in the void. Simple. Quiet. Almost nothing.

harmonia_chapel.name: Chapel
harmonia_chapel.description: Sister Concord's chapel in Harmonia. Quiet, devotional, lit by a single candle.

harmonia_library.name: Library
harmonia_library.description: Cantor Vell's library. Maps of the four dragons line the walls.

eldertree_hollow.name: The Hollow
eldertree_hollow.description: Inside the ancient tree. Greenleaf speaks of a world of square houses and loud roads.

frosthold_warden_hut.name: Warden's Hut
frosthold_warden_hut.description: Warden Trygg's hut. The fire never quite warms the room — Glacius is close.

sandrift_glassmaker.name: Glassmaker's Workshop
sandrift_glassmaker.description: Senga's glassmaking workshop. Furnace heat, sand, and warnings about Pyrroth.

grimhollow_witch_hut.name: Witch's Hut
grimhollow_witch_hut.description: Old Mire's hut. She IS the cave that holds Umbraxis. The walls listen.

ironhaven_watchtower.name: Storm Watchtower
ironhaven_watchtower.description: Drogal's watchtower. He speaks in current — Voltharion's tongue is half his own now.

maple_heights_arcade.name: Glitch City Arcade
maple_heights_arcade.description: Crusher Pete runs the arcade — and remembers Greenleaf, somehow, in a world of square houses.

brasston_clockwork_loft.name: Clockwork Loft
brasston_clockwork_loft.description: Magister Clavis's clockwork loft. Brass gears tick out the schedule of the Mechanism below.

rivet_row_union_hall.name: Local 8743 Union Hall
rivet_row_union_hall.description: Steward Vetch's union hall. The grievance ledger is open — the Warden has been cataloguing again.

node_prime_daemon_lounge.name: Daemon Lounge
node_prime_daemon_lounge.description: SUDO-1 keeps the legacy terminal alive. The Root remembers what they used to do here.

vertex_threshold.name: The Threshold
vertex_threshold.description: The Witness sits on a single bench. She has seen all five prior worlds — and knows what comes next.
